original_image_tags: A blank, manila-colored file folder, aged and slightly wrinkled. The folder is presented vertically against a solid black background. At the top, a tab is folded down. The body of the folder is mostly empty, with three punched holes visible at the bottom edge. There is a single hole punch at the top center of the tab.

elements.description: A blank, tan-colored paper enclosure. At the top, there is a stamped red text label that reads 'ENCLOSURE 1' and handwritten red numbers '3894-158'. There are three black hole-punch marks (one at the top center, two at the bottom). A small handwritten notation is visible below the stamped label. The main body of the paper is blank.

judge.reason: Description A claims the file folder has no text, while Description B claims it has a stamped red label with specific text ('ENCLOSURE 1', '3894-158'), indicating a direct contradiction on the presence of quoted text.
